3255960.name: Build!!!
3255960.description:
🃏 Build your city, one card at a time.

In this strategy and construction game with deckbuilding mechanics, every card counts. Craft your ideal deck, play your resources wisely, and raise towering buildings from the ground up... or watch it all fall apart if you play your cards wrong.

Combine workers, materials, abilities, and wild cards to unlock new structures, activate special powers, or sabotage your rivals’ plans. Every game is a new city, a fresh challenge, and a chance to refine your deck.

🧱 Key Features:

  • Deckbuilding + Construction: Use cards to lay foundations, build floors, and complete iconic buildings.

  • Wild cards: Trigger unique effects or shift the course of the game with powerful special cards.

  • Progressive development: Improve your deck with each match, unlocking new strategies.

  • Solo mode: Play at your own pace and compete to build the most impressive city.

  • Unique pixel art style: Expressive architecture in detailed pixel art, from rustic houses to futuristic skyscrapers.
3255960.supported_languages: 英语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
